title: Portfolio Row Summary

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

Maybe I am blind, but I cannot seem to find a way to turn on the summary row ay the bottom of a Group for a Portfolio. Specifically, I am trying to get a sum of numbers in a column:
